name: rda-ispd-python

metadata.name: rda-ispd-python
metadata.summary: Python tools to manage and enable data support for the International Surface Pressure Databank (ISPD) archive at the NCAR Research Data Archive (RDA)

documentation:
# rda-ispd-python
Python tools to manage and enable data support for the International Surface Pressure Databank (ISPD) archive at the NCAR Research Data Archive (RDA)

modules.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb
documentation:
Module supporting tools and utilities to interact with 
the ISPD database (ISPDDB)

methods.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb.FillISPD.fill_ispd_data
documentation: Insert ISPD data into ISPDDB

methods.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb.FillISPD.process_ispd_file
documentation: Read ISPD record from given file name and save into ISPDDB

modules.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config
documentation: Variable definitions for ISPD tables.

variables.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config.NUM2NAME
documentation: cache field names from component/field numbers

variables.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config.NAME2NUM
documentation: cache component/field numbers from field names

variables.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config.UMATCH
documentation: unique matches, use iidx as key

variables.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config.FIELDINFO
documentation: cache the field metadata info for quick find

variables.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config.UIDLENGTH
documentation: uid record len

variables.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config.UIDOFFSET
documentation: uid value offset

variables.name: rda_ispd_python.ispddb_config.ATTMNAME
documentation: standalone attm section name to fill

modules.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common
documentation: Common library with ISPD dataset and database utilities

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.init_table_info
documentation: initialize the database table information

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.get_ispd_records
documentation: Append the individual fields and return ispd records for one line of input

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.get_one_attm
documentation: Gets all field values for a single table in an observation record

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.initialize_attm_records
documentation: Initialize dict records for specified attm table

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.add_ispd_records
documentation: Add multiple ispd records into their respective tables in RDADB

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.add_inventory_record
documentation: add inventory information into control db

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.get_ispd_date
documentation: Get ISPD date

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.get_itidx_date
documentation: get the itidx record from given uid

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.get_record_date
documentation: get record date for given year, month and day

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.date2tidx
documentation: get the tidx from table inventory for given date

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.iidx2date
documentation: get the date from table inventory for given iidx

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.get_inventory_record
documentation: get max inventory index

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.get_inventory_didx
documentation: get previous/later inventory didx for given date

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.init_current_indices
documentation: initialize the global indices

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.init_indices_for_date
documentation: initialize indices for givn date

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.update_control_tables
documentation: update or add control tables

functions.name: rda_ispd_python.ispd_common.add_records_to_table
documentation: Add records to a table
